name: BBO vs Deep Book Divergence (Continuation)
hypothesis: The parent spec, which hypothesized a price reversal on book divergence, was conclusively wrong (WR 5.3%), suggesting the opposite is true. This spec inverts the signal: when BBO imbalance is high (obi_1 > 0.7) but the deep book is weak (obi_ex_bbo < -0.3), the price will follow the aggressive BBO pressure. This is a short signal.
mutation_note: Inverted the signal direction from long_if_pos to long_if_neg based on feedback that the original hypothesis was consistently wrong, suggesting the opposite effect is predictive.
